full_text:
Lady Yuan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Yuanwas born in Runan. Described as unpretentious, she had no children and rejected chance to become Empress. Lady Yuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lady Yuan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
